## Summary

A short one-line description of what you're proposing.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is this useful?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. If you have a specific API in mind, show it:

```python
# Example of proposed usage
from rudra512 import new_function
new_function(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Anything else to add — links, references, prior art.
